original_prompt: 帮我给这个产品和手臂添加一个室内场景
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Subject: A realistic female hand wearing a wide, multi-strand beaded cuff bracelet. The bracelet is made of translucent peach-tinted spheres, arranged in 9-10 parallel rows. The beads have a glossy, glass-like refraction.
Setting: A warm, minimalist interior scene. A soft, creamy beige textured wall in the background. Partial view of a wooden coffee table with a linen tablecloth. Gentle sunlight filtering through sheer curtains, casting soft, dappled shadows on the arm and bracelet, enhancing the transparency of the beads.
Atmosphere: Cozy, elegant, warm lighting, soft focus bokeh background, lifestyle photography style, high resolution.

[Text & UI Layout]
Main Title: "Eternal Elegance" (Elegant Serif font, centered top, soft gold color)
Sub Title: "Handcrafted Glass Beads" (Minimalist Sans-serif, below title, smaller size)
Tagline: "Shine with every movement" (Bottom center, small italic font)
layout_logic: 建议将手臂和手排置于画面中心略偏右的位置，以展示光影效果。背景保持简洁干净，使用奶油色或浅米色调来衬托桃粉色的手排。文字信息放置在左侧或顶部的留白区域，确保不遮挡产品主体，字体选用纤细优雅的风格以匹配产品的精致感。
